chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-6459 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.28871/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 30.01.2025 Mr.Muhammad Saad Shafiq Siddiqui, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent Nos.2 and 3, which is taken on record. This petition is seeking implementation of order of the Customs Appellate Tribunal. In view of the judgment dated 09.08.2024, of the Supreme Court in the case of Khalid alias Muhammad Khalid and others vs. Collector of Customs (Adjudication), Customs House Lahore etc. (Civil Petition No.3391 of 2024), petition is not maintainable, hence, the same is dismissed. Judge Judge nasir
